headline: **MLB Daily Recap: April 12, 2026**
article:
The Arizona Diamondbacks fell short in a 3-4 decision to the Philadelphia Phillies, with Kyle Schwarber leading the Phillies' offense. The Detroit Tigers secured a 6-1 victory over the Miami Marlins, with Riley Greene leading the offense and Casey Mize pitching a strong 5.2 innings. The Pittsburgh Pirates edged the Chicago Cubs in a thrilling 4-3 victory, with Braxton Ashcraft leading the Pirates' pitching effort.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, affecting their teams' lineups. Tyler O'Neill of the Baltimore Orioles was placed on the 7-day injured list due to a concussion, while Hunter Harvey of the Chicago Cubs was placed on the 15-day injured list with right triceps inflammation. George Springer of the Toronto Blue Jays was placed on the 10-day injured list with a left great toe fracture, and Adley Rutschman of the Baltimore Orioles was placed on the 10-day injured list with left ankle inflammation.

Several teams made roster moves in the past day. The Milwaukee Brewers traded Steward Berroa to the Philadelphia Phillies for cash, while the St. Louis Cardinals traded Nick Raquet to the Baltimore Orioles for Brayden Smith. The Cardinals also acquired Patrick Galle from the Boston Red Sox. The San Francisco Giants traded Tyler Fitzgerald to the Toronto Blue Jays for cash, and the Atlanta Braves acquired Victor Mederos from the Los Angeles Angels.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Fall Short in Philly**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks dropped a 3-4 decision to the Philadelphia Phillies, with Kyle Schwarber leading the Phillies' offense.

top_news.title: **Tigers Take Down Marlins 6-1**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers secured a 6-1 victory over the Miami Marlins, with Riley Greene leading the offense and Casey Mize pitching a strong 5.2 innings.

top_news.title: **Pirates Edge Cubs in Thrilling 4-3 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Pittsburgh Pirates secured a narrow win over the Chicago Cubs, with a final score of 4-3. Braxton Ashcraft led the Pirates' pitching effort, striking out 9 batters in 5 innings.

top_news.title: **Twins Take Down Blue Jays 7-4**
top_news.summary: The Minnesota Twins secured a 7-4 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Trevor Larnach leading the offense and Joe Ryan pitching a strong 7.0 innings.

top_news.title: **Giants Fall to Orioles in 6-2 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a 6-2 victory over the San Francisco Giants, with Casey Schmitt and Taylor Ward contributing to the winning effort.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Edge Phillies in Thrilling 4-3 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks secured a narrow win over the Philadelphia Phillies, taking the final score 4-3. Corbin Carroll and Jose Fernandez were among the key contributors for the Diamondbacks.

top_news.title: **O'Neill Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Baltimore Orioles right fielder Tyler O'Neill has been placed on the 7-day injured list due to a concussion, with the move retroactive to April 9, 2026.

top_news.title: **Brewers Make Roster Move**
top_news.summary: The Milwaukee Brewers traded RF Steward Berroa to the Philadelphia Phillies for cash on April 8, 2026.
